nodes.title: villain
nodes.body: Villain is loose-passive (VPIP 70%, PFR 20%) and folds to hero flop c-bets 5/17 times (29%). River aggression shows up in 4/100 hands (4%). Villain has won 45 of 55 showdowns.

nodes.title: Frequent preflop 3-bettor
